mapper.insert: INSERT INTO club_manages( CLUB_TITLE, LOCATION, HOST_ID, MAX_MEMBERS, DESCRIPTION, REG_DATE, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{clubTitle}, #{location}, #{hostId}, #{maxMembers}, #{description}, NOW(), 'ACTIVE' )

INSERT INTO club_members ( CLUB_ID, USER_ID, USER_ROLE, CREATE_DATE, ADDR1LEVEL, ADDR2LEVEL, ADDR3LEVEL, GENDER, BIRTH_YEAR ) VALUES ( #{clubId}, #{userId}, 'HOST', NOW(), #{addr1Level}, #{addr2Level}, #{addr3Level}, #{gender}, #{birthYear} )
